description: Mid-range opportunity with partial data, weak platform fit, and moderate archetype alignment
domain: Procure Source & Buy > Strategic Sourcing & Supplier Selection

data_readiness.rationale: Some L4s reference supplier scorecards and qualification metrics, others are qualitative

aera_platform_fit.rationale: Aligns with Decision & Action pillar broadly but no single capability directly addresses this

archetype_confidence.rationale: Qualification criteria are rule-based but initial identification phase is less structured

anti_patterns: platform_fit should NOT be 3 — no specific implementation pattern exists
Scores should NOT all cluster at the same value
